title: Read-only local helper
text: This helper can read files from a project workspace, open file content for inspection, and read config values before presenting a structured summary to the operator. It focuses on analysis, validation, and review guidance with clear setup notes, sample usage, expected outputs, safety checks, and operator approval steps for every run.

metadata_context.description: Long-form guidance for inspection workflows with explicit setup, operator validation notes, and clear expected outputs.
metadata_context.readme: Detailed overview covering setup, usage, examples, validation steps, rollback notes, and review checkpoints for controlled operation in a local workspace.

title: Local file writer
text: This automation can write file outputs, create file snapshots, and rename file artifacts during a guided maintenance flow. The usage notes explain setup, validation, review steps, expected outputs, approval checkpoints, rollback handling, and operational boundaries in enough detail for a reviewer to understand the workflow safely.

metadata_context.description: Comprehensive maintenance workflow notes with validation and rollback guidance.
metadata_context.readme: Expanded operating notes with examples, approval steps, and clear boundaries for local maintenance usage.

title: Outbound API caller
